---
title: "About Me"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Shared accent ── */
:root {
  --about-accent: #2563eb;
  --about-accent-light: #60a5fa;
}

/* ── Container ── */
.about-wrap {
  max-width: 52rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.25rem;
}

/* ── Section headings ── */
.about-section-heading {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}

/* ── Where I'm From card ── */
.origin-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6);
  background: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, rgba(0,0,0,0.02));
}
.origin-emoji {
  font-size: 4rem;
  line-height: 1;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.origin-card h3 { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
.origin-card p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── Languages progress bars ── */
.lang-bar-container { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.lang-bar-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: baseline;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
.lang-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.lang-level {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
}
.lang-bar-track {
  height: 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, rgba(0,0,0,0.08));
  overflow: hidden;
}
.lang-bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: var(--about-accent);
  width: 0%;
  transition: width 1s ease-out;
}

/* ── Interests tags ── */
.interests-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
}
.interest-tag {
  padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
  background: transparent;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  cursor: default;
}
.interest-tag:hover {
  border-color: var(--about-accent);
  color: var(--about-accent);
}

/* ── Journey timeline ── */
.journey-timeline {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 2.5rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.journey-timeline::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 7px;
  top: 6px;
  bottom: 6px;
  width: 2px;
  background: var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6);
}
.journey-stop {
  position: relative;
  margin-bottom: 2.25rem;
}
.journey-stop:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* Dot on timeline */
.journey-stop::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: -2.5rem;
  top: 0.3rem;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 3px solid var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.journey-stop.stop-red::before    { background: #ef4444; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ef4444; }
.journey-stop.stop-orange::before { background: #f97316; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f97316; }
.journey-stop.stop-green::before  { background: #22c55e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #22c55e; }

.journey-stop h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.15rem 0;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}
.journey-year {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--about-accent);
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}
.journey-role {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}
.journey-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── Responsive ── */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .origin-card {
    flex-direction: column;
    text-align: center;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="about-wrap">

<p style="font-size:1rem; line-height:1.7; color:var(--bs-secondary-color,#6c757d);">
Beyond the research papers and lab work, here's a bit more about who I am, where I come from, and the path that brought me here.
</p>

<!-- WHERE I'M FROM -->
<p class="about-section-heading">Where I'm From</p>

<div class="origin-card">
  <div class="origin-emoji">&#x1F1F5;&#x1F1F7;</div>
  <div>
    <h3>Puerto Rico</h3>
    <p>
      Born and raised on the island. Puerto Rico shaped my values, my drive, and my identity.
      It's a big part of why I co-founded <strong>BORI (Boricuas Organized for Impact)</strong> at Georgia Tech
      &mdash; to make sure Puerto Rican students feel at home and stay connected to our culture, even far from the island.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- JOURNEY -->
<p class="about-section-heading">Journey</p>

<div class="journey-timeline">

  <div class="journey-stop stop-red">
    <h4>Puerto Rico &#x1F1F5;&#x1F1F7;</h4>
    <div class="journey-year">Where it all began</div>
    <p class="journey-desc">
      Growing up on the island gave me community, culture, and resilience.
      It set the foundation for everything that came next.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="journey-stop stop-orange">
    <h4>Arlington, TX &mdash; UT Arlington</h4>
    <div class="journey-year">Aug 2018 &ndash; May 2022</div>
    <div class="journey-role">Honors B.S. in Electrical Engineering &middot; Minors in Math &amp; Physics</div>
    <p class="journey-desc">
      Graduated Summa Cum Laude as a National Merit Scholar.
      Got my start in research through Dr. Yan Wan's Dynamical Networks &amp; Control Lab
      and Dr. Frank Lewis' Autonomous Systems Lab, working on learning-based path planning
      for multi-vehicle systems and reinforcement learning applied to quadrotor control.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="journey-stop stop-green">
    <h4>Atlanta, GA &mdash; Georgia Tech</h4>
    <div class="journey-year">Aug 2022 &ndash; Present</div>
    <div class="journey-role">Ph.D. in Robotics &middot; FACTS Lab &middot; Advisor: Dr. Samuel Coogan</div>
    <p class="journey-desc">
      Currently pursuing my doctorate as a Goizueta Fellow, researching safe autonomy
      and nonlinear control for quadrotor UAVs. I also co-founded BORI, TA the Vertically
      Integrated Project in Robotics, and try to walk the tightrope between theory and
      hardware implementation every day.
    </p>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- LANGUAGES -->
<p class="about-section-heading">Languages</p>

<div id="lang-bars">
  <div class="lang-bar-container">
    <div class="lang-bar-header">
      <span class="lang-name">Spanish</span>
      <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-track">
      <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="100"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-bar-container">
    <div class="lang-bar-header">
      <span class="lang-name">English</span>
      <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-track">
      <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="100"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-bar-container">
    <div class="lang-bar-header">
      <span class="lang-name">Portuguese</span>
      <span class="lang-level">Can read well, still polishing speech</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-track">
      <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="55"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-bar-container">
    <div class="lang-bar-header">
      <span class="lang-name">French</span>
      <span class="lang-level">Semi-conversational</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-track">
      <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="35"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- INTERESTS -->
<p class="about-section-heading">Interests</p>

<div class="interests-grid">
  <span class="interest-tag">Safe Autonomy</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Quadrotor UAVs</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Nonlinear Control</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Hardware Deployment</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Cooking</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Dance</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Reading</span>
  <span class="interest-tag">Community Building</span>
</div>

</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var bars = document.querySelectorAll('.lang-bar-fill');
  if (!bars.length) return;
  var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
    entries.forEach(function (entry) {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.style.width = entry.target.getAttribute('data-pct') + '%';
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  bars.forEach(function (bar) { observer.observe(bar); });
});
</script>
```
